pull_request.title: docs: sharpen adoption roadmap and validation

summary: Adoption-roadmap cleanup plus component discovery, report contract truth, and static call validation.

checks.name: pytest
checks.next_action: Warnings are from terminal examples rendered without template names.

checks.name: pre-commit
checks.detail: Local hook blocked by parent uv nested workspace
checks.next_action: Run hooks from a non-nested checkout before merge.

changed_files.summary: Rejects duplicate keyword args and positional args after keyword args.
Narrows overclaimed Slack and terminal surface language.

diagnostics.message: Call to 'stat_card' is missing required prop 'value'.
diagnostics.next_action: Pass value=... or add a default in the component definition.
Convert the literal or change the prop annotation.
Remove the duplicate argument before render.

steward_findings.finding: Keep PR comments and step summaries backed by fixtures and snapshots.
Use real diagnostic codes and locations in adoption demos.
Collect data before render; templates should not perform network or git I/O.

release_preview.headline: Review packets turn Kida reports into a concrete engineering workflow.
notes: Adds a checked report-template contract inventory.
Adds a review packet example rendered to Markdown and terminal output.
Adds refactor-safety demos for static component diagnostics.
